prompt: I have an existing 'orders' service using hexagonal architecture (Express, Postgres write, MongoDB read, Redis cache, Kafka, OpenTelemetry). The Order entity has: id, customerId, items (array), status (pending|cancelled), and transition method cancel(). There are use cases: CreateOrderUseCase, GetOrderUseCase, CancelOrderUseCase. Please add unit tests for the Order domain entity and all three use cases, and an E2E test suite for the HTTP endpoints. Use Vitest.

assertions.name: domain-test-covers-validation-failure
assertions.description: Order domain test includes at least one test that expects create() to throw on invalid input (e.g. missing customerId)

assertions.name: domain-test-covers-cancel-guard
assertions.description: Order domain test includes a test that cancel() throws (or rejects) when the order is already cancelled

assertions.name: doubles-extend-abstract-ports
assertions.description: Test doubles (FakeWriteRepo, FakeCache, etc.) extend the abstract port classes rather than using vi.fn() or plain objects

assertions.name: use-case-tests-assert-persistence
assertions.description: At least one use case test asserts that the write repository received the saved entity (e.g. writeRepo.store has length 1)

assertions.name: use-case-tests-assert-event-published
assertions.description: At least one use case test asserts that the event bus published the correct topic (e.g. 'order.created')

assertions.name: e2e-setup-uses-in-memory-adapters
assertions.description: _test/e2e/setup.ts wires the real OrderController with in-memory test doubles — no real database or Kafka connection

assertions.name: e2e-tests-use-supertest
assertions.description: E2E test files use supertest to make HTTP requests against the Express app

assertions.name: e2e-test-covers-error-case
assertions.description: E2E tests include at least one case that expects a 4xx response (e.g. missing required field returns 400, or not found returns 404)
